setup.title: System Setup Wizard
setup.subtitle: Configure your SmartCookie application instance
setup.templatesDesc: Choose which default role templates you want to seed for your company. This step is optional and can be skipped.
setup.adminDesc: This administrator account will hold root permissions to configure companies and lessons.
setup.recoveryEmailDesc: Used to receive important system notifications.
setup.complexityCase: At least 1 uppercase and 1 lowercase letter
setup.complexitySym: At least 1 number and 1 special symbol
setup.companyDesc: Define the primary workspace identity. This represents your root entity.
setup.contactInfoDesc: Support info associated with this workspace profile.

acceptInvitation.title: Activate Your Account
acceptInvitation.subtitle: Set your secure password to activate your invitation
acceptInvitation.success: Account activated successfully! Logging you in...

errors.length: Password must be at least 8 characters long.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email to request a reset link
forgotPassword.success: If the email exists and is active, a password reset link has been sent.

resetPassword.title: Reset Your Password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a new secure password for your account
resetPassword.success: Password updated successfully! Logging you in...

errors.length: Password must be at least 8 characters long.

settings.title: System Settings
settings.rolesDesc: Configure roles, duplicate/delete them, and customize hierarchical parent role access levels.
settings.hubSubtitle: Customize and manage your system environment settings, user permissions, and directory controls.
settings.rolesSubtitle: Configure role-based access control (RBAC), system permissions, and company settings.
settings.userGroupManagementSubtitle: Manage your company department structure, organization units, and learning group cohorts.
settings.userGroupManagementDesc: Manage organization units, hierarchy, learning groups, and memberships for corporate structural organization.
settings.emptyState: No settings are configurable yet - check back as more features are added.
settings.fieldBuilderDesc: Create and customize system-wide profile field definitions, categories, and edit permissions.
settings.fieldBuilderSubtitle: Manage profile field categories, edit field attributes, and configure role-based access control.

management.hubSubtitle: Oversee system roles, organization structure, and course/lesson assignments.
management.rolesDesc: Configure roles, duplicate/delete them, and customize hierarchical parent role access levels.
management.rolesSubtitle: Configure role-based access control (RBAC), system permissions, and company settings.
management.userGroupManagementDesc: Manage organization units, hierarchy, learning groups, and memberships for corporate structural organization.
management.userGroupManagementSubtitle: Manage your company department structure, organization units, and learning group cohorts.
management.assignmentsDesc: Create and track learning assignments, assign courses to groups or individuals, and view compliance reports.
management.assignmentsSubtitle: Manage lesson and course assignments, set completion targets, and track user progress.
management.placeholder: Assignment Management feature is coming in Task 5.

rbac.title: Role-Based Access Control
rbac.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this role?
rbac.superuserProtected: Superuser role is protected and cannot be modified.

expiring.title: Expiring Temporary Groups
expiring.description: Temporary training cohorts expiring within the 3-day notification threshold window.
expiring.noGroupsDesc: All active temporary training cohorts have comfortable remaining lifetimes.

errors.failedToLoad: Failed to load expiring learning groups.
errors.unexpected: An unexpected error occurred while loading expiring groups.

groups.title: Learning Cohorts & Groups
groups.subtitle: Nestable cohorts, project teams, and training class assignments.
groups.noCohortsDesc: Create your first learning cohort using the form on the right.
groups.deletedDesc: Deleted cohort groups can be fully restored along with all user training tracking records.
groups.cohortNamePlaceholder: e.g. Q3 New Grads, Sales Camp
groups.parentNote: Nesting is for organizational grouping only. A member of a child group is not automatically a member of the parent.
groups.nestingClarityNote: Nesting groups is for organizational grouping only: a member of a child group is not automatically considered a member of the parent group.
groups.moveText: Move {{name}} to a different position in the learning group tree hierarchy.

errors.unexpectedFetch: An unexpected error occurred while fetching learning groups data.
errors.failedToAddMember: Failed to add member to group.

structure.treeSubtitle: Hierarchical visualization of your corporate organization divisions.
structure.noUnitsDesc: Create your first top-level unit using the form on the right.
structure.recentlyDeletedDesc: Organization units soft-deleted within the last 14 days can be recovered with all historical memberships.
structure.moveUserTextSuffix: Moving the user automatically terminates any of their existing primary corporate Division memberships.
structure.assignManagerText: Assign a manager to govern the unit {{name}}.
structure.deleteModalSubtitle: Configure deletion style behavior and review the real-time affected users list.
structure.reassignOptionDesc: Reassign direct child units to the parent unit. Soft-delete only this target node.
structure.subtreeOptionDesc: Soft-delete this unit and all of its nested child units together in a single cascade.
structure.noAffectedMembers: No active users or manager memberships will be affected by this deletion.

errors.unexpectedFetch: An unexpected error occurred while fetching organization data.
errors.failedToAssignUser: Failed to assign user to organization unit.

usersTab.title: User Management
usersTab.subtitle: View, filter, edit, archive, restore, and bulk import users.
usersTab.reactivateRestore: RESTORE - Recover all original user training tracking records and status histories
usersTab.reactivateFreshStart: FRESH_START - Reset the user with empty learning statistics and clean progress sheets
usersTab.archiveBody: Are you sure you want to archive this user? This will set their status to ARCHIVED.

bulkImport.title: Bulk Import Users
bulkImport.subtitle: Import multiple users at once using a CSV template.
bulkImport.dropzoneText: Drag and drop your CSV file here, or click to browse
bulkImport.dropzoneSubtext: Only .csv files are supported. Maximum file size 2MB.
bulkImport.successMessage: Successfully imported {{count}} users into the system.
bulkImport.warningAllOrNothing: This is an all-or-nothing import. If any row contains errors, the entire import will be blocked.
bulkImport.fixAllErrors: Please resolve all validation errors in your CSV file and upload again to proceed.
bulkImport.allValid: All rows are valid and ready for import!
bulkImport.importError: Failed to complete bulk import. Please check your network connection or CSV file.

management.title: Assignment Management
management.subTitle: Manage lesson and course assignments, set completion targets, and track user progress.
management.noAssignments: No assignments found matching this status filter.
management.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this assignment? This will cancel it for all targeted users.
management.initialDataError: Failed to load initial assignment data.

createModal.selectLessonError: Please select a lesson to assign.
createModal.selectCourseError: Please select a course to assign.

report.title: Assignment Instance Report
report.noInstances: No learning instances generated for this assignment yet.

content.title: Lesson & Course Content Designer
content.subTitle: Allows administrators to draft lessons, bundle them into multi-lesson courses, customize ordering, and toggle publication status.
content.noLessons: No lessons found. Create a lesson stub to begin.
content.noCourses: No courses found. Create a course stub to begin.
content.noLessonsInCourse: No lessons assigned to this course yet. Add some from the picker below.
content.allLessonsInCourse: All lessons are already in this course.
content.selectCourseFirst: Select a Course first to view/manage its lesson structure and order.

myLessons.title: My Lessons & Assignments
myLessons.subtitle: View, track progress, and complete your assigned learning content.
myLessons.noLessonsQueryDesc: We couldn't find any lessons matching your search query. Try another term!
myLessons.noLessonsDesc: You do not have any lessons assigned to you in this section. Explore courses to self-assign published content!
myLessons.removeSelfAssignConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this self-assigned lesson?

messages.completeError: Failed to mark lesson as complete.

catalog.title: Learning Catalog
catalog.subtitle: Discover and self-assign training courses or individual lessons instantly.
catalog.noLessonsDesc: There are currently no published lessons available in the learning catalog. Check back soon!
catalog.noCoursesDesc: There are currently no published courses available in the learning catalog. Check back soon!
catalog.noLessonsInCourse: No lessons assigned to this course yet.

messages.fetchError: Failed to load catalog data from server.
messages.fetchErr: Error loading catalog. Please try again.
messages.selfAssignCourseSuccess: Course "{{title}}" assigned! Added {{count}} new lesson(s) to your list.

errors.invalidDate: Must be a valid date format.
errors.invalidPattern: Value does not match the required format.

disabledExplanation.systemManaged: This field is managed by the system.
disabledExplanation.adminOnly: This field is only editable by administrators.
disabledExplanation.roleNotPermitted: Your role does not have permission to edit this field.

personal.errorAlert: Please correct the validation errors before saving.
personal.pictureDescription: Upload a JPG, PNG, GIF, or WebP photo. Max size of 2MB is enforced via magic-bytes checking.

security.changePasswordDesc: Ensure your account is protected with a long, unique password.
security.passwordSuccess: Your password has been changed successfully!
security.changeEmailDesc: Update your account primary contact and login email address.
security.verificationPendingDesc: We have sent a verification link to {{email}}. The email change will remain pending and your current email will not be updated until you click the confirmation link.
security.verificationPendingExpiry: This confirmation link will expire in 24 hours.
security.mfaDesc: Add an extra layer of security to your account.
security.mfaUnavailable: This feature is not yet available and is currently scheduled for a future update.

notifications.title: Notification Preferences
notifications.description: Manage how and when you receive notifications from the platform.
notifications.mandatoryExplanatory: This notification type is set as mandatory by your company administration.

LESSON_ASSIGNED.title: Lesson Assigned
LESSON_ASSIGNED.desc: Receive notifications when a new lesson is assigned to you.

REMINDER.title: Reminder
REMINDER.desc: Helpful reminders about your pending or active assignments.

DUE_SOON.title: Due Soon
DUE_SOON.desc: Alerts when a lesson assignment is nearing its due date.

OVERDUE.title: Overdue
OVERDUE.desc: Critical alerts when an assignment's deadline has passed.

COMPLETION_CONFIRMATION.title: Completion Confirmation
COMPLETION_CONFIRMATION.desc: Confirmation notifications when you successfully complete a lesson.

CERTIFICATES.title: Certificates
CERTIFICATES.desc: Get notified when you earn a course or lesson certificate.

SYSTEM_ANNOUNCEMENTS.title: System Announcements
SYSTEM_ANNOUNCEMENTS.desc: Important system maintenance or feature announcements.

account.title: Account Information
account.description: View your system-assigned account identifiers, status, and group memberships.

confirmEmail.title: Email Change Confirmation
confirmEmail.successDesc: Your email address has been updated. As a security measure, all existing sessions have been signed out. Please log in again using your new email address.
confirmEmail.failedDesc: This verification link may have expired or already been consumed. Please request a new email change verification link from your profile security settings.

fieldBuilder.title: Profile Field Builder
fieldBuilder.subtitle: Manage custom fields, categories, and permission rules.
fieldBuilder.deleteCategoryConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this category? Any associated fields will be moved to unassigned.
fieldBuilder.fieldNamePlaceholder: e.g. Date of Birth, Employee ID
fieldBuilder.fieldDescPlaceholder: Guidance text displayed to users when editing this field
fieldBuilder.rolesDesc: Roles permitted to edit this field for other users (multi-select):
fieldBuilder.deleteFieldConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this custom field? This is permanent and deletes all user-entered values.
fieldBuilder.deleteDisabledSystem: Core system fields are mandatory for basic platform operations and cannot be deleted.
fieldBuilder.fieldKeyReadOnly: Core field key cannot be modified.
fieldBuilder.fieldTypeReadOnly: Core field type cannot be modified.
